chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D-2175 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 07-5-2025 Mr. Ajay Kumar, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statement files by State Life Insurance Corporation Group & Pension Zone, Karachi is taken on record. Counsel for the petitioner submits that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, therefore under instructions, he does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
